retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount get is incidental and not the function's primary purpose.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is device initialization (memory allocation, regmap setup, DT parsing, power supply registration, IRQ request, hardware init). The call to devm_usb_get_phy is one incidental step for OTG support; the function does not primarily manage reference counts and does not return a reference-counted object to the caller.
